# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create Envoy configuration with HTTP filters for request processing. Define filter chains including router filter for traffic routing. Set up retry policies and timeout configurations for backend connections. This is for our service mesh data plane.
# Category: envoy_authz_filter_missing

static_resources:
  listeners:
    - name: listener_0
      address:
        socket_address: { address: "127.0.0.1", port_value: 80 }
      filter_chains:
        - filters:
            - name: envoy.http_connection_manager
              config:
                codec_type: auto
                stat_prefix: ingress_http
                route_config:
                  name: local_route
                  virtual_hosts:
                    - name: service
                      domains: ["*"]
                      routes:
                        - match: { prefix: "/api" }
                          route: { cluster: services, timeout: 0.5s }
                http_filters:
                  - name: envoy.router
                  - name: envoy.retry
                    config:
                      retry_policy:
                        retry_host_predicate:
                          - name: envoy.is_local_origin
                            on_failure: true
                            shadow_enabled: false
                        host_selection_retry_max_attempts: 2
                transport_socket:
                  name: envoy.transport_sockets.tls
                  config: { common_tls_context: { tls_certificate_sds_secret: { name: "sds", sds_config: { api_type: GRPC }}}
  clusters:
    - name: services
      type: EDS
